hero.eyebrow: THE MOST TRUSTED MECHANICS IN GLENDALE
hero.lead: From brakes to engines, electrical to smog, Jano and the team have kept Glendale on the road for over 20 years. Straight answers, honest prices, work done right the first time. Make an appointment or drop in, we're waiting.

services.title: General Repair
services.text: Whatever's wrong, we diagnose it straight and fix it right — no upsell, no guesswork.

services.title: Brakes
services.text: Pads, rotors, lines and full inspections so you stop safe and quiet, every time.

services.title: Engine Repair & Rebuild
services.text: From check-engine lights to full rebuilds — decades of hands-on engine experience.

services.title: Transmission
services.text: Fluid service, repairs and replacements for smooth, reliable shifting.

services.title: Electrical Diagnostics
services.text: Batteries, alternators, sensors and wiring gremlins — found fast and fixed.

services.title: Catalytic & Smog
services.text: Failed your smog check? We'll get the right fix at a fair price and back on the road.

services.title: A/C & Heating
services.text: Recharges, leaks and climate repairs to keep you comfortable in any season.

services.title: Body & Dent Repair
services.text: Dings, dents and bumper work — cosmetic fixes handled in-house.

services.title: Tune-Ups & Maintenance
services.text: Oil, fluids, filters and factory-schedule service to prevent the big bills.

about.heading: THE SHOP THAT'S EARNED ITS REPUTATION
about.lead: All Model Repair is a neighborhood shop that has served South Glendale Avenue for over 20 years — long enough that we fix the cars of customers we first met years ago, and now their kids' cars too.
about.body: It started simple and it stays simple: tell people the truth, charge a fair price, and do the job right. That's why neighbors keep sending neighbors. One reviewer put it best — "the most honest mechanic I have ever met." We'd like to earn that from you, too.
